name: PokéAPI
description: A free, open Pokémon data API. No authentication required. Great for demos and AI experiments with structured data.

tools.name: get_pokemon
tools.description: Get a Pokémon's stats, abilities, types, and moves by name or ID.

params.name: name_or_id
params.description: Pokémon name (e.g. pikachu) or Pokédex number (e.g. 25)

tools.name: list_pokemon
tools.description: Get a paginated list of all Pokémon names and their API URLs.

tools.name: get_type
tools.description: Get all damage relations for a Pokémon type (e.g. fire is weak against water).

params.name: name_or_id
params.description: Type name (e.g. fire, water, electric) or ID

tools.name: get_ability
tools.description: Get the description and affected Pokémon for a specific ability.
